rationale: Gov't Code §2306.1114 governs notice requirements for housing fund applications. It is wholly unrelated to the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount and contains no provision affected by the proposed change.
quote: Not later than the 14th day after the date an application or a proposed application for housing funds described by Section 2306.111 has been filed, the department shall provide written notice of the filing of the application or proposed application to the following persons:
_note: No overlap between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this housing-fund notice statute.
